title: Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vodafone Idea Holdings Services:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea Holdings Services!
